# Python dev dependencies for the binding CI (build + test).
#
# This is the compiled form of ci-dev.in. Regenerate the hash-locked version
# (recommended before a release) with:
#   uv pip compile --generate-hashes .github/requirements/ci-dev.in -o .github/requirements/ci-dev.txt
# The CI python job installs these directly (`pip install maturin pytest numpy`);
# this file is the pinned source Dependabot tracks and the refresh script locks.
maturin
pytest
numpy
